creator: c.brinkhaus@t-online.de
text:
Created attachment 169722
ranger.py: change environment to LANG=C to show correct Umlaute

The environment of ranger is changed to LANG=C.
Now py-ranger is on 1.7.2 but the problem still exists.
The patch should fix that. Poudriere on 10.3 and portlint -ac are fine.
